AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON MAR-30-1995

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, DONNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHULTZ, STEPHANIE $7,352.43 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,352.43, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR PLAINTIFF DONNA WILLIAMS IS TO RECOVER $2500, AND INTERVENOR UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA TO RECOVER $4852.43. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF FOR $292.75.
